global.description: The ad features a clean and modern design with a focus on a promotional offer.
global.main_message: Promoting a special weekend offer for a product.

elements.label: Solid color background
elements.description: A smooth, solid teal background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, white text that reads 'Your next favorite pick' prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: Product image
elements.description: Two stylized mirrors or reflective surfaces depicted in a minimalistic design.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline that says 'Only this weekend'.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button with white text 'Install now' set against the teal background at the bottom.
elements.text_content: Your next favorite pick Only this weekend €29.99 Install now

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'BoltCart' in a bold font, displayed in white at the top left corner.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small, circular badge in yellow with the word 'SALE' in bold, black text at the top right.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, minimalistic with vibrant colors, promoting a weekend sale.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the product image is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: BoltCart, SALE, Your next favorite pick, Only this weekend, €29.99, Install now
